name: Poached Chicken
recipeIngredient: 5 to 6 lbs. stewing chicken or 2 broiler-fryers
recipeInstructions:
SAUCE
4 tablespoons butter or margarine
1/4 cup flour
1 cup chicken broth or bouillon
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/8 teaspoon pepper
1/4 cup parsley, chopped
1/2 cup heavy cream
2 tablespoons butter or margarine
In a slow-cooking pot, cover the chicken with water. Add celery, carrot, onion, and salt. Tie together the parsley, bay leaf, cloves, and thyme in a small square of cheesecloth. Add this bundle to the pot.
Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours.
Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a medium saucepan. Stir in flour and cook over low heat for several minutes. Gradually stir in broth; simmer until smooth. Add salt, pepper, parsley, and cream. Just before serving, beat in the remaining 2 tablespoons butter, one tablespoon at a time.
Remove the chicken from the pot, slice it, and serve with the creamy sauce.
